name: resource-ncbi
description: Aggregates NCBI public literature, dataset, and gene retrieval routes behind one Source plugin while each route remains independently addressable.

resources.label: PubMed
resources.description: Biomedical article metadata via NCBI E-utilities PubMed APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI E-utilities APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum PubMed records to request from ESearch.

resources.label: NCBI GEO
resources.description: Gene Expression Omnibus dataset metadata via NCBI GEO DataSets E-utilities.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI GEO DataSets APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum GEO records to request from ESearch.

resources.label: NCBI BioSample
resources.description: Sample metadata via NCBI E-utilities and Datasets BioSample report APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum BioSample records to request from ESearch.

resources.label: NCBI Datasets
resources.description: Genome assembly reports and download summaries via NCBI Datasets v2.
riskNotes: Read-only NCBI Datasets API; optional My NCBI API key is projected as an API header only when configured.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Lookup mode: accession, taxon, bioproject, biosample, wgs, or assembly_name.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum genome assembly reports to request.

resources.label: NCBI Gene
resources.description: Gene ID, symbol, organism, and genomic location metadata via NCBI E-utilities.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI E-utilities db=gene calls; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum NCBI Gene records to request.

interface.shortDescription: PubMed, GEO, BioSample, Datasets, and Gene retrieval
interface.longDescription: Aggregates NCBI public literature, dataset, and gene retrieval routes behind one Source plugin while each route remains independently addressable.
defaultPrompt: Search PubMed, GEO, BioSample, NCBI Datasets, or NCBI Gene through the NCBI source plugin.
